title: MilkyWaySky
description: A deep space-themed sky overlay featuring the Milky Way stretching across a bright, detailed night sky.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de17563379f818d304af39600ca6cb782b7fc23e.jpeg)

**MilkyWaySky** is a sky overlay designed to bring a cinematic galaxy atmosphere to your game. It enhances your nights with a detailed Milky Way, rich stars, and immersive depth while keeping your blocks and gameplay visuals untouched.

This overlay works perfectly on top of the default sky or combined with almost any texture pack, making it ideal for PvP, survival, or cinematic gameplay.

### 🌌 Features

- Custom space sky
- Mars as the main celestial body
- Earth visible in the background
- Designed to stay readable during gameplay

### Requirements

- Needs OptiFine
- Custom Sky: ON
- Stars: ON
- Sun & Moon: ON
